features: FUN TO CREATE! - Crystal Art Kits are an enjoyable introduction to Diamond Painting. An accessible entry-level kit to a unique pastime, taking the crafting world by storm!
START A COLLECTION OF SPARKLING ART - A perfect gift item for a friend or decoration for your home or living space.

AN ENGAGING CRAFT FOR STRESS RELIEF - The process of creating a Craft Buddy Crystal Art Kit by hand is a tranquil and engaging hobby. Share with family and friends, or take a mindful moment to yourself, away from screen time!

EVERYTHING YOU NEED IS INCLUDED - Each kit comes with everything in one handy pack, including adhesive template, pick up tool, gem tray, jelly wax, and the finest dimensional resin gems, bevelled to create shimmer and shine.
GREAT VALUE FOR MONEY - Perfect for gifting and ideal for all ages and levels, from beginners to advanced crafters.
description: Send a card with a touch of magic and mischief this Christmas, with the Craft Buddy 'Merry Grinchmas' Crystal Art Card 18x18cm. It captures the whimsical spirit of the holidays with a playful twist, and features 'The Grinch' by Dr. Seuss. The iconic green character peeks through a glittering wreath with his quizzical expression. Perfect for fans of the beloved tale, this handmade card adds a dash of humour to any Christmas celebration. The 'partial crystal' kit allows the illustration to show through and gives contrast and depth. Each Crystal Art card design has a numbered adhesive template so just use the handy pick up tool to lift up the coloured crystals and place them on the corresponding numbered dots. All tools are included, as well as instructions and a plain white envelope. The card is blank inside making it a perfect greeting, or gift for a crafter, whether a beginner or advanced Crystal Artist.
